3a1(da): rnams ni e mango mtshar che'o// zungs thub pa'i blo dng ldan zning reg pa gsal baskyes bu rnams ni e mango mtshar che'o// zungs thub pa'i blo dang ldan zhing dbang tsob 
3a2(da): cing dbang dang ldan pa'i skyes bu rnams ni e mango mtshar che'o// zungs thub pa'i blo dang ldan zhing mad du byung ba'i skyes bu rnams ni e mango mtshar cho'// zungs thub pa'i blo dang ldan /

3a4(da): blo dang ldan zhing bzod pa bsgom pa'i skyes bu rnams ni e ma ngo mtshar chi'o// zungs thub pa'i blo dang ldan zhing brtson 'grus che ba'i skyes bu rnams ni e ma ngo mtshar che'o//

3b1(da): skyes bu rnams ni e ma ngo mtshar che'o// zungs thub pa'i blo dang ldan zhing thabs la mkhas pa'i skyes bu rnams ni e ma ngo mtshar che'o// zungs thub pa'i blo dang ldan zhing shes rab / 
3b2(da): bskyed pa'i skyes bu rnams ni a mango mtshar che'o// zungs thub pa'i blo dang ldan zhing la bcad pa'i skyes bu rnams ni e mango mtshar che'// yid kyi khye' chung / gsung dung sems / 
3b3(da): dpa' sems dpa' chen po rnams dang / rigs kyi bu dang rigs kyi bu mo zhig/ e mango mtshar che' de lta bu la spyod cing reg pa khar ba na/ nge mtshar skye bar 'gyur ro// de nas yid / 
3b4(da): kyi khye'u chung gis gsol pa/ gnhen rab lags/ bdag ni blo sbyangs nas ngo mtshar che b zhig tu 'tshal na/ skyes bu dag zungs thub pa'i blo dang ldan pa rnams kyis las dka' ba cig

4a1(da): spyad cen/ dum byu rtsa gsum 'am/ gsal ba'idi kyi bgrlng la sku bcas pa'i dus su yang / zang dkar gsum zes na blo byangs pa lags te/ e mango mtshar ce'o/

4a3(da): lus la byug nas blo sbyangs pa lags te/ e ma ngo mtshar che'o// re lnga yis l+dzags kyi bda' blan nas blo sbyangs pa lags te/ e ma ngo mtshar che'o// 'bras bu gsum gyis

4a6(da): nas blo sbyangs pa lags te/ e ma ngo mtshar che'o// khrus kyi srdzing bu la zhus byas nas blo sbyangs pa lags te/ e ma ngo mtshar che'o// rol mtsho chen po bzhi la khrus byas nas

514a3(da): 'dzin pa'i 'o za kbyeb pa y/ tho bci mdzo lngo'i po zying ga sa r grab/ a 'khro mang bzgyans y la'i rtag bra' thog bna la/ gus bgregs chan pa'i gsal bsh/ gang gsal ma dpo bra byung bbrang g yad la'i bos 
514a4(da): 'phrul par byas pa zhig gzhi bzhag byas theg/ byung po lha rgyal rge dgen pa'i lag bris yig nag ds rnying 'thod pa can 'ga' dpe zhus kyi mthun byed g.yad pa gnang yang de' ma dpo khra pad dang thungs gcig tu yin pa 
514a5(da): 'jrug byang dang las gsal bshad byas nad khras skams de nad dang 'dag/ blung pa ba dog dgen pas mthan byed du g.yod pa gnang ba'i lag bres yig dgad dpo nying thams men la cha med kyang n dum sa brgyad yo pa can dang / ba /

514b1(da): gsung can des gtsi bsdrud byas pa yin/ de la bres pas cad nad mang ba dang / myang 'das 'gres la bab 'jegs can gyi dang tshugs segs dmigs gsal can 'dag/ ma dpo khra spad can nang myang 'das 'gres la bab 'jegs la / 
514b2(da): / byas par ma chang gi 'gre sangs 'dag pasegs gco dp de la brgyud bcos med pad sed gnag byas theg/ gang gsal bsdud dpo de'i dog mtshan yed pa rnams kyis cd nod mongn gsal can la tha brkangs byas te/ ge bani / 
514b3(da): mdzed lnga'i dpo rnying phyegs bgrigs / kyo ad grangs rapad zhus bgrigs byas pa yin kyang // dung ma rtegs dbang gis chad lhagsegs yod nges te/ spyi la rabbyad sngan lo nga lnga brgya ldhag nas gangs can nad kyi yul / 
514b4(da): du yi ga' par khang 'dzugs bskun dang // se gzhi legs bgrigs byas pa'i 'grems sel yengs khyab byed srel dad zin na'ang / g.yung dung ban gyi dpe gzhi' bsdu bgrigs byed pa'o g skabs kyi thed yug de tsal byung med pas/ 'di // 
514b5(da): phyogs la nyams myeng dang lag len segs la mig nes len gzni dkgen pas gal cha gsad du yin pa dang / shes su de zhus bgrigs pa ce yang mkhyen dpyed dab 'byams pa min chad/ 'doi' thad mthun rkyen zung la 'gal / 
514b6(da): rkyen mang ba'i gseb ru dul brling 'grig pa dang la byung na/ phyegs gang so'i hed ypug dang gnas sangs tsha las brgal ba'i legs ma zhig then thabs med pas/ de lcugs kyis rjes su gzigs mtkhan rnam pas 'di la dg rkyen /
